title: Anime Cinematic Style Detailed Painterly Backgrounds Tradition
sourceTitle: Anime Cinematic Style Detailed Painterly Backgrounds Tradition
prompt: Anime cinematic style with detailed painterly backgrounds in the tradition of quieter prestige animation muted teal and deep amber palette, soft cel shading with subtle watercolor texture overlays. An elderly woman with close-cropped silver hair sits alone inside a cramped deep-sea research submersible, her face bathed in cool blue glow filtering through a circular porthole. Beyond the glass, a vast bioluminescent jellyfish drifts past, its translucent bell casting rippling light patterns across her weathered, wonder-struck face. Instrument panels glow warm amber behind her. Tight medium shot framing uses the porthole curve as a natural vignette. Mood is solitary awe no action, no tension, only stillness and light. No text unless specifically requested except on signing and decorative items. --ar 16:9 --ar 16:9 --v 8
